title: Create Tram Additions
description: A mod that announces the next stop inside your create trains and do custom announcements in the schedule!
body:
# Create Tram Additions ## Create Tram Additions adds on-board announcements and custom announcements to your trains. ### Current features: - On-board announcement (Next stop is ... (automatic), Arrived at ... (automatic) - Custom announcements on board with using the schedule - Custom MP3 announcements with a configureable python server (by default the mod uses my official TTS endpoint). For more information about custom MP3s join the mods discord and ping me (@im_nano) ### This mod has optional support for CRN using placeholders: - ${group} - ${line}
If you put these in announcements, the mod will replace them with the actual group/line ${next_stop} is also possible, and you can even use it without CRN. **Make a backup of your world before installing or updating the mod.**
